strategy_spec.scorer_description: Mean of multi-horizon GBM 3m and 6m forward-rank predictions
strategy_spec.regime_gate_rule: crash if SPY 21d <= -8% OR (SPY 6m <= -5% AND SPY 21d <= -3%); recovery if SPY below 200dma streak >= 40d AND SPY just back above 200dma AND SPY 21d > 0; bull if SPY 12m >= 10% AND above 200dma; else normal.
strategy_spec.universe: PIT S&P 500 members at each rebalance month-end
strategy_spec.rebalance_rule: Hold each basket for 6 months. Reform basket on month T if (T - last_rebalance) >= 6m or regime transitions to/from cash.

recommended_strategy.name: v3_pit_sp500_ml_3plus6_k3_h6
recommended_strategy.description: v3 PIT S&P 500 strategy.  Walk-forward Gradient Boosted Trees ranking model (3m+6m forward-rank ensemble) restricted to point-in-time S&P 500 constituents at each rebalance.  Top-3 picks held for 6 months; equal-weight; 'tight' regime gate goes 100% cash on SPY 21d <= -8% or 6m <= -5%. Walk-forward 42.80% MEAN OOS CAGR over 10 splits 2003-2024 with 10/10 positive, 9/10 beating SPY. 1.5x annual turnover.

wf_explanation.explanation: 10 walk-forward TRAIN/TEST splits over 2003-2024 on the PIT S&P 500 universe.  The GBM is fit on TRAIN data only (annual retrain, 7-month embargo), then applied to TEST.  Reported metrics are TEST-window CAGR, edge over SPY, Sharpe, and max drawdown — all out-of-sample.
